subcodes.first_line: We have desired to make mention of Our servant Husayn, who attained unto Our remembrance in the early days when We were seated upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اردنا ان نذکر عبدی الحسین الذی فاز بذکری فی اول الایام اذ کنا مستویا علی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
